pages.title: Blood Moon Message
pages.text: $(br)$(4)$(l)"This is going to be a terrible night..."/$$(p)$(li)A $(c)Blood Moon/$ occurs about every 10 days, the first one will occurs on about 20th day. Sleeping will not able to skip the night during it.$(br)$(li)On other nights, all players must be sleeping to skip the night.$(br)$(li)If Vignette is turned off, the red border effect will not be shown.
